title: F2+F3+F4: schema sweep in api-contracts.ts (describe sharpening + precedence deprecation + dead-tool removal)
description: Three independent but co-located schema cleanups to api-contracts.ts. F2: tighten knowledgeSectionsInputSchema.ai_selected_stable_ids.describe() so the LLM understands these are stable_ids surfaced by fab_plan_context (not arbitrary). F3: mark the optional precedence tuple field on PlanContextResult as deprecated (kept for one rc, removed in rc.24) since downstream now relies on entries[].precedence directly. F4: remove orphan getKnowledgeInput/Output/Annotations + the dead fab_get_rules tool surface — these are unreferenced after the two-step API rewrite and would mislead future maintainers.

files.change: F2: update describe to: 'Stable ids returned by fab_plan_context.entries[].stable_id with selectable=true; choose 1..N to fetch sections for'. F3: add .deprecated() / JSDoc @deprecated on precedence tuple. F4: delete getKnowledgeInputSchema, getKnowledgeOutputSchema, getKnowledgeAnnotationsSchema, and any fab_get_rules tool descriptor.
Remove the test cases asserting fab_get_rules / getKnowledge* exports; add an assertion that neither symbol is exported

implementation: Grep references to getKnowledgeInputSchema / getKnowledgeOutputSchema / fab_get_rules across the monorepo to confirm zero live callsites
Apply F4 deletions first (largest surface — most likely to surface import errors)
Apply F3 deprecation marker + add a one-line code comment pointing to entries[].precedence as the new source
Run `pnpm -r typecheck` to catch any downstream imports we missed

criteria: grep returns zero live callsites for getKnowledgeInputSchema / getKnowledgeOutputSchema / fab_get_rules outside the schemas file
tool-contracts.test.ts asserts absence of removed symbols and passes
Precedence tuple field is marked @deprecated in JSDoc with a removal-in-rc.24 note

rationale.chosen_approach: Bundle three small schema edits in one task — they all touch api-contracts.ts and a single test file; splitting would inflate merge-conflict surface
alternatives_considered: Three separate tasks (rejected: same file, would force serial merges)
Defer F4 deletion to rc.24 (rejected: dead exports actively mislead — feedback_clean_slate)
decision_factors: Pre-user clean-slate allows breaking schema removal
F2/F3 describe sharpening unblocks LLM correctness alongside F1
rationale.tradeoffs: Single PR is slightly larger to review, but reviewer cost dwarfed by avoiding three merge cycles

manual_checks: Inspect rendered MCP tool descriptions via `fab --list-tools` and confirm getKnowledge / fab_get_rules are absent
